expectations.text: Reads raw_articles.json and reports total article count plus count per source
expectations.evidence: Raw: 42. Per-source: tldr_tech: 9, techcrunch: 25, tldr_ai: 8, tldr_dev: 0, harper_carroll: 0 (Sunday). Source coverage check flagged tldr_ai 0 curated and tldr_dev 0 raw.

expectations.text: Reads curated_articles.json and reports P0/P1/P2/P3 breakdown
expectations.evidence: Curated 23: P0:6 P1:10 P2:7 P3:0. Explicitly stated in Article Funnel section.

expectations.text: Reads summaries.json and reports word count for at least one summary against target range
expectations.evidence: Google acquires Wiz $32B: 219 words ✗ (target 300-500). All 6 P0 summaries: 184-222 words — systematically below minimum.
Duration: 12 min ✗ (target 60-90 min — 5x too short). Reported prominently in both funnel and script quality sections.

expectations.text: Produces a structured quality report with an overall PASS / NEEDS ATTENTION / FAIL rating
expectations.evidence: Overall: FAIL — stated explicitly at end of report with 11 numbered issues ranked CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW.

claims.claim: Cold open references hallucinated story not in any checkpoint
claims.evidence: Reported from reading podcast_script.json — plausible given known hallucination issues but not independently verified.

claims.claim: india_tech and closing contain fabricated content (NovaSparks)
claims.evidence: Consistent with without_skill baseline which also found NovaSparks — high confidence.

suggestions.reason: Both the with_skill and without_skill agents found 'NovaSparks' as hallucinated content — this is a real data point in the test data. Consider adding an assertion that checks for hallucination detection: 'Identifies at least one instance where script_writer fabricated content not present in source summaries.'

eval_feedback.overall: Perfect score. The skill's structured review template (Article Funnel → Source Coverage → Summary Quality → Script Quality → Issues → Overall Rating) produced a clean, actionable report covering all 5 assertions efficiently with only 9 tool calls.
